_DEPRECATED: This file is DEPRECATED as of Phase 6 (Regression Lock-In). Do NOT use as authoritative baseline. The self-referential values below were generated by the same RegressionRunner code that validated against them — they could never detect genuine regressions. All regression testing now uses data/validation/accuracy_report.json which traces to reference_data.json (published Long-EZ specs, wind tunnel data). See .planning/ROADMAP.md Phase 6 for context.
